text: <sup>[1]</sup> <sup>[AA]</sup> The Presbyter to the chosen Lady and to her children whom I love in truth—and not only I but also all who know the truth—
because of the truth that dwells in us and will be with us forever.
Grace, mercy, and peace <sup>[2]</sup> will be with us from God the Father and from Jesus Christ the Father's Son in truth and love.
I rejoiced greatly to find some of your children <sup>[3]</sup> walking in the truth just as we were commanded by the Father. <sup>[AB]</sup>
But now, Lady, I ask you, not as though I were writing a new commandment but the one we have had from the beginning: let us love one another. <sup>[AC]</sup>
For this is love, that we walk according to his commandments; <sup>[4]</sup> this is the commandment, as you heard from the beginning, in which you should walk. <sup>[AD]</sup>
<sup>[AE]</sup> Many deceivers have gone out into the world, those who do not acknowledge Jesus Christ as coming in the flesh; such is the deceitful one and the antichrist. <sup>[5]</sup>
Look to yourselves that you <sup>[6]</sup> do not lose what we worked for but may receive a full recompense.
<sup>[AF]</sup> Anyone who is so "progressive" <sup>[7]</sup> as not to remain in the teaching of the Christ does not have God; whoever remains in the teaching has the Father and the Son.
<sup>[8]</sup> If anyone comes to you and does not bring this doctrine, do not receive him in your house or even greet him; <sup>[AG]</sup>
for whoever greets him shares in his evil works.
<sup>[9]</sup> Although I have much to write to you, I do not intend to use paper and ink. Instead, I hope to visit you and to speak face to face so that our joy may be complete. <sup>[AH]</sup>
The children of your chosen sister <sup>[10]</sup> send you greetings.
